assertionResults.fullName: storeNoveltyNode chama a fn registrada após onEvent
assertionResults.title: chama a fn registrada após onEvent

assertionResults.fullName: storeNoveltyNode não lança quando nenhuma fn está registrada
assertionResults.title: não lança quando nenhuma fn está registrada

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM engine is running
WHEN the same event pattern is observed repeatedly
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM engine is running WHEN the same event pattern is observed repeatedly THEN noveltyScore is always a finite non-negative number
assertionResults.title: THEN noveltyScore is always a finite non-negative number

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM engine is running
WHEN the same event pattern is observed repeatedly
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM engine is running WHEN the same event pattern is observed repeatedly THEN noveltyScore should decrease over repeated observations (requires trained weights)
assertionResults.title: THEN noveltyScore should decrease over repeated observations (requires trained weights)

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM engine is running
WHEN a novel event pattern is observed after familiar ones
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM engine is running WHEN a novel event pattern is observed after familiar ones THEN both familar and novel noveltyScores are finite non-negative numbers
assertionResults.title: THEN both familar and novel noveltyScores are finite non-negative numbers

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM engine is running
WHEN a novel event pattern is observed after familiar ones
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM engine is running WHEN a novel event pattern is observed after familiar ones THEN noveltyScore for a new pattern is higher than for a familiar one (requires trained weights)
assertionResults.title: THEN noveltyScore for a new pattern is higher than for a familiar one (requires trained weights)

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM has learned a pattern
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM has learned a pattern WHEN resetWalk() is called THEN the internal state (g, M, hiddens) is zeroed
assertionResults.title: THEN the internal state (g, M, hiddens) is zeroed

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM has learned a pattern
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM has learned a pattern WHEN resetWalk() is called THEN the next observation of the familiar pattern has high novelty again (requires trained weights)
assertionResults.title: THEN the next observation of the familiar pattern has high novelty again (requires trained weights)

ancestorTitles: GIVEN two different node types with the same semantic role
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN two different node types with the same semantic role WHEN their observations are encoded THEN nodes of the same @type produce identical type-slot encodings
assertionResults.title: THEN nodes of the same @type produce identical type-slot encodings

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM is learning a sequence
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM is learning a sequence WHEN steps are performed THEN predictionConfidence is always in the valid range [-1, 1]
assertionResults.title: THEN predictionConfidence is always in the valid range [-1, 1]

ancestorTitles: GIVEN the TEM is learning a sequence
assertionResults.fullName: GIVEN the TEM is learning a sequence WHEN steps are performed THEN predictionConfidence should increase after learning the same sequence (requires trained weights)
assertionResults.title: THEN predictionConfidence should increase after learning the same sequence (requires trained weights)

assertionResults.title: THEN all output vectors have the correct dimensions
